title: korthalsella rubra
intro: Korthalsella rubra, also known as the red Korthalsella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae, a type of parasitic plant that grows on the roots of other plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Korthalsella rubra has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although its availability and preparation may vary.
